subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: The abomination of desolation is the one who appears and tries to destroy the Truth and who makes some changes in the teachings of God.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @prophecy and fulfillment
